title: 36 Piece Die Cast Metal Toy Cars Diecast Mini Racing Vehicles for Kids, Convertibles, F1, Sports Cars, Model Collector Cars Gift Playset
features: 36 METAL DIE CARS - This unique set includes 36 vanity racing cars to bring lots of new adventures for your little racing fan. Let your child's imagination go wild and race through a constantly expanding world of awesome die-cast cars that bring extreme action. This toy car set will help create many hours of imaginative fun.

CREATIVE PLAY - Let the race begin! Children can recreate their favorite car scenes, drive around the living room, and race around a rug! Endless car-themed fun! Kids love automobiles, and there is no better way to demonstrate how much fun they are having than with a collection of these fantastic cars.

PERFECT SIZE - This Metal Die Cast Cars for Kids is made for little fingers and is ideal for helping your children develop motor skills and collaboration. This toy car set is not going to take up too much space, so kids can quickly build up a collection of awesome Die-cast cars. Die-cast cars are the perfect addition to any toy box encouraging imaginative role play.

MATERIAL - Our toy car set is made from a premium metal construction with plastic parts for safety. Each car measures approx. 6cm and comes with exciting paint designs in bright colors! Stunning attention to detail. Perfect to be displayed in the room of any Motorsport fan. Race cars, convertibles, sports cars, and all the favorites can be found in this set!

PERFECT GIFT - This set makes a great gift and is the perfect starter pack for any die-cast vehicle fan. Help your little ones to build their very own collections of racing cars. Design for all racing fans! Ideal as stocking fillers, gifts, or party favors. Die Cast Cars Set is suitable for Ages 3+. Box dimensions approx. 38 cm x 26 cm x 2 cm.
